title: Ensure Collection Contents are Used
description: If a collection is declared and populated but its values are never read anywhere in the code, it can be considered unused. This often arises from incomplete refactoring, copy-pasting errors, or typos. Unused collections can lead to wasted memory and degraded application performance. Additionally, their presence makes the code harder to read and understand.
recommendation: Use the collection's values somewhere in the code
impact: Wasted memory and degraded application performance, harder to read and understand code

checks.message: Collection is declared and populated but its values are never read
